backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the PROXIIS backend with task management, user/task profiles, and authorization mixins. Implements CRUD operations for tasks, user profiles, and task verification/rating.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming implementation of a fixed FAB button in HubView that opens PostTaskModal, with green-to-purple gradient styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PROXIIS Vite app, loading Google Sign-In, QRCode.js scripts, and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level view state (landing/hub/profile) with a neon grid background and global toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontally scrollable pill button row for filtering tasks by category, using the app's green-to-purple gradient for the selected state.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Dialog modal allowing performers to upload a completion photo and creators to verify and star-rate completed tasks.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Horizontally scrollable filter bar with Newest, Most Urgent, and Highest Paying toggle buttons styled with the app's gradient when active.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Top navigation bar for the hub view featuring the PROXIIS logo, a toggleable search input, a notifications popover, a leaderboard sheet, and a profile button.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Displays the top 10 users ranked by earnings, tasks completed, and average rating, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating a new task, handling photo upload with progress tracking, form state, and submission via the useCreateTask hook.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Renders a UPI payment QR code using the CDN-loaded QRCode library, generated from a UPI deep link based on task price with a 10% platform fee.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Presentational component that renders a row of filled, half-filled, or empty star icons based on a numeric rating value.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Card component displaying a task's photo, category badge, title, location, deadline, and price, opening a TaskDetailsSheet on click with an auth/profile guard.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: Side sheet showing full task details with actions for accepting (with UPI payment), toggling Telegram chat, completing, and deleting a task based on the user's role.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: Auto-scrolling reel that continuously loops through a hardcoded list of recently completed task descriptions as a visual activity feed.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Exports a placeholder UPI_ID constant used for payment processing throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: React hook that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, initializes Google Sign-In, and exposes signIn/signOut functions along with decoded user info from the JWT credential.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: React Query hook that fetches the leaderboard (array of Profile) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, including getting the caller's profile, creating a Google-linked profile, and saving profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: Collection of React Query mutation hooks for task lifecycle actions: assigning a performer, completing, verifying, toggling Telegram discussion, and deleting tasks.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all tasks, searching tasks, retrieving a user's post history, and creating a new task via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark-mode color theme (greens, purples, teals) used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for building Telegram profile links and UPI payment deep links, including a 10% platform fee calculation.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between datetime-local input strings, bigint nanosecond timestamps, and human-readable formatted date strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main hub page displaying a filterable, searchable list of tasks with a floating action button that opens the PostTaskModal for authenticated users with a profile.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Marketing landing page for PROXIIS showing a hero section, a 'How it Works' explainer, and a WeeklyProgressReel, with a 'Get Started' button navigating to the hub.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: User profile page handling Internet Identity login, Google OAuth linking, profile creation, and displaying the user's stats and post history.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based design tokens, custom shadows, border radii, fonts, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for PROXIIS tracking schema version, existing features, and a pending feature request to add a bottom-right floating action button for task creation.
